perturbation.original_text: You shall operate the Franchised Business in the United States of America Territory using the assumed trade name "The Original Soupman", "The Original Soupman of [City]" and/or any other trade name we designate in conjunction with your formal business name. You shall not use the Proprietary Marks, or any part thereof, as part of your corporate name or other legal name, nor shall your corporate or other legal name include any other service name. The name of your corporate entity and any trade or assumed names or other legal names used by you in the operation of the Franchised Business shall be approved by us prior to any use by you.
perturbation.changed_text: You shall operate the Franchised Business in the United States of America Territory using the assumed trade name "The Original Soupman", "The Original Soupman of [City]" and/or any other service name we designate in conjunction with your formal business name. You shall not use the Proprietary Marks, or any part thereof, as part of your corporate name or other legal name, nor shall your corporate or other legal name include any other trade name. The name of your corporate entity and any trade or assumed names or other legal names used by you in the operation of the Franchised Business shall be approved by us prior to any use by you.
perturbation.explanation: The terms 'trade name' and 'service name' are being used interchangeably in the text, leading to an in-text contradiction. Initially, the franchised business name is stated to use an assigned trade name. Subsequently, the modified text prohibits the use of any other 'trade name' which contradicts the initial permission to operate under an assigned trade name. This creates a direct in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You shall operate the Franchised Business in the United States of America Territory using the assumed trade name "The Original Soupman", "The Original Soupman of [City]" and/or any other service name we designate in conjunction with your formal business name. You shall not use the Proprietary Marks, or any part thereof, as part of your corporate name or other legal name, nor shall your corporate or other legal name include any other trade name. The name of your corporate entity and any trade or assumed names or other legal names used by you in the operation of the Franchised Business shall be approved by us prior to any use by you.
perturbation.justification: The modified text changes 'trade name' to 'service name' in the clause prohibiting the use of these names in the corporate or legal name, while the initial clause permits operating under an assigned trade name. Since both sections are present in the 'Contradicted Text' and 'Changed Text', the change makes it contradictory to permit operation under an assigned trade name while simultaneously prohibiting the use of any trade name. This aligns with the definition of 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction' because the terms are being used interchangeably leading to conflicting obligations.

perturbation.original_text:
In consideration for such training, trade secrets and confidential information, you and your principals agree that during the term of this Agreement, and for a continuous uninterrupted period commencing upon expiration or termination of this Agreement, regardless of the cause for termination, and continuing for a period of three (3) years thereafter, neither you nor your principals shall, directly or indirectly, for themselves, or through, on behalf of, or in conjunction with any person, persons, partnership, limited liability company or corporation:
7.1.1 Divert or attempt to divert any business or customer of the Franchised Business or any Unit Franchisee anywhere, by direct or indirect inducement or otherwise, or do or perform, directly or indirectly, any other act injurious or prejudicial to the goodwill associated with our Proprietary Marks or the System.
perturbation.changed_text:
In consideration for such training, trade secrets and confidential information, you and your principals agree that during the term of this Agreement, and for a continuous uninterrupted period commencing upon expiration or termination of this Agreement, regardless of the cause for termination, and continuing for a period of three (3) years thereafter, neither you nor your principals shall, directly or indirectly, for themselves, or through, on behalf of, or in conjunction with any person, persons, partnership, limited liability company or corporation:
7.1.1 Divert or attempt to divert any business or customer of the Franchised Business or any Unit Franchisee anywhere, by direct or indirect inducement or otherwise, or do or perform, directly or indirectly, any other act injurious or prejudicial to the goodwill associated with our Proprietary Marks or the Procedures.
perturbation.explanation: The use of 'System' and 'Procedures' are being used interchangeably in the same sentence to create an in-text contradiction. The goodwill is previously being referred with the System, and the 'Procedures' are the implementation of the System itself which causes confusion, because Procedures, are not the core of the brand, but the System is. This creates uncertainty about what the Master Franchisee is prohibited from harming, because there is no definition on what consitute the Procedures.
perturbation.contradicted_text:
In consideration for such training, trade secrets and confidential information, you and your principals agree that during the term of this Agreement, and for a continuous uninterrupted period commencing upon expiration or termination of this Agreement, regardless of the cause for termination, and continuing for a period of three (3) years thereafter, neither you nor your principals shall, directly or indirectly, for themselves, or through, on behalf of, or in conjunction with any person, persons, partnership, limited liability company or corporation:
7.1.1 Divert or attempt to divert any business or customer of the Franchised Business or any Unit Franchisee anywhere, by direct or indirect inducement or otherwise, or do or perform, directly or indirectly, any other act injurious or prejudicial to the goodwill associated with our Proprietary Marks or the Procedures.
perturbation.justification: The changed text replaces "System" with "Procedures", while the contradicted text also refers to goodwill associated with "Procedures". This creates a contradiction because "System" and "Procedures" are not clearly defined as interchangeable, and the goodwill is previously being referred with the System, creating an in-text contradiction. This is an example of Misaligned Terminology, where multiple terms are used interchangeably without a clear definition. The explanation states that 'Procedures, are not the core of the brand, but the System is,' and the change creates uncertainty about what the Master Franchisee is prohibited from harming because the definition of Procedures is missing.

perturbation.original_text: We will advise you on all appropriate facets of the System and all pertinent new developments in the operation of a The Original Soupman business and/or master franchise business.
perturbation.changed_text: We will advise you on all appropriate facets of the Framework and all pertinent new developments in the operation of a The Original Soupman business and/or master franchise business.
perturbation.explanation: The words 'System' and 'Framework' are being used interchangeably. Throughout the agreement, 'System' is defined and carries a specific meaning related to the operational methods, trademarks, and overall structure of the franchise. Changing 'System' to 'Framework' in this single instance creates confusion. The term 'Framework' is a broader, undefined term, making it unclear whether the advice provided covers the same scope as originally intended under the 'System'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You acknowledge and agree that the System must continue to evolve in order to reflect the changing market and to meet new and changing customer demands and that, accordingly, variations and additions to the System may be required from time to time in order to preserve and enhance the public image of the System and to insure the continuing operation efficiency of Unit Franchisees generally. Accordingly, you acknowledge and agree that we may from time to time change the System, including, without limitation, the adoption and use of new or modified trademarks, products, services, equipment and furnishings and new techniques and methodologies relating to the preparation, sale, promotion and marketing of services and supplies. You shall promptly accept, implement, use and display all such additions, modifications and changes at your sole cost and expense, and you shall ensure that all Unit Franchisees in your Master Territory promptly accept, implement, use and display all such additions, modifications and changes. You further acknowledge and agree that we may inspect your Franchised Business and any Unit Franchise in the Master Territory to verify that your Franchised Business and/or such Unit Franchise is operating in compliance with our System, as it may be modified from time to time.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'System' to 'Framework' introduces a contradiction because the contradicted text explicitly refers to the 'System' and the franchisee's obligation to adhere to it, including modifications and inspections to ensure compliance with the 'System'. 'System' has a defined meaning, while 'Framework' does not. Therefore, by changing 'System' to 'Framework', it's unclear whether the advice provided pertains to the specific 'System' that the franchisee is obligated to follow, creating ambiguity and a potential contradiction regarding the scope of required compliance and advice.
